summary: Iteration 3 validates the new LivingPortrait component on the Gateway page and confirms no regression in any previously verified flow. Backend pytest 3/3 PASS (root, resume PDF, /api/status round-trip). Frontend: data-testid 'living-portrait' renders on '/', contains 'gateway-avatar' with src that includes 'AI%20avatar.jpeg', and 'portrait-starfield' is present as a CANVAS element. Zero console errors/warnings across the entire flow including portrait hover/mousemove (parallax + starfield drift), navigation to /professional, /personal, /emotional, and back to /. The cinematic intro is dismissed by 'intro-skip', sets sessionStorage 'intro_seen'='1', and does NOT re-render on revisit. All previously verified gateway testids (gateway-page, gateway-kicker, gateway-name-0/1, gateway-tagline, portal-professional/personal/emotional, gateway-recruiter-link, world-switcher) continue to render. Per-world reveals work: prof-heading-tw on /professional, personal-heading on /personal, candlelight-toggle on /emotional toggles candlelight-overlay (off→on confirmed). Recruiter link navigates to /recruiter via TransitionOverlay. LivingPortrait correctly unmounts when navigating away (no listener leak errors).
observations: LivingPortrait useEffect dependency array for the starfield is [] — capturing wrapRef/canvasRef which are stable refs, so this is safe. The mousemove and resize listeners are properly cleaned up in the return function (verified by zero errors after navigating away).
The mousemove handler is attached to window (not the wrapRef element) which is intentional so cursor influence can be tracked even when not directly hovering — confirmed working without throwing.

Canvas internally scales by devicePixelRatio inside resize() — only invoked on initial mount + window resize; if the portrait container resizes without a window resize event (rare), canvas could become misaligned, but not a functional defect.

Two separate useEffects each register their own window 'mousemove' listener (one for tilt, one for starfield tracking). This is intentional and both cleanup correctly. Slight minor optimization opportunity to combine, but no leak observed.
Inherited from prior iteration: Typewriter still injects inline <style> inside the prof-heading-tw span (textContent dirty). Not new in this iteration; reported in iteration_2 as optional cleanup.
critical_code_review_comments: LivingPortrait — consider consolidating the two window 'mousemove' listeners into a single handler that updates both motion values and starfield tracking state (minor perf/clarity improvement; not a correctness issue).

LivingPortrait — canvas resize() is wired to the window 'resize' event only. If the parent layout reflows due to non-window-resize triggers (e.g., font load shifting the lg:col-span-5 grid), the canvas could appear slightly off until next resize. Consider a ResizeObserver on container for robustness.
LivingPortrait — starfield draws unconditionally at full rAF rate even when the document is hidden. Consider pausing rAF on document.visibilityState === 'hidden' to save battery.
Inherited: server.py still uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') — migrate to FastAPI lifespan handler.
Inherited: Typewriter injects a <style> block inside the rendered span (dirties element.textContent for tests/SR).
seed_data_creation: One TEST_pytest_client status_check via POST /api/status during round-trip test (harmless diagnostic doc).
context_for_next_testing_agent: LivingPortrait additive enhancement is fully verified. Testids: 'living-portrait' (motion.div wrapper), 'portrait-starfield' (canvas inside wrapper), 'gateway-avatar' preserved on inner . Zero console errors during hover/mousemove/parallax animation and during unmount when navigating to /professional, /personal, /emotional, /recruiter. Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/test_life_portfolio_api.py — 3 tests, all passing. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. As before, set sessionStorage.intro_seen='1' or click 'intro-skip' to bypass the cinematic intro on '/'.
rca of the issue: No issues found. LivingPortrait renders all expected sub-elements (gateway-avatar, portrait-starfield), parallax/starfield drift work without console errors, listeners are cleaned up on unmount, and no previously verified flow regressed. Backend and Frontend at 100% success rate.
